summary.description: One short paragraph. MUST begin with the load indicator 'Policy loaded: N rule files from rules/.' where N is the count of rules/*.md files read.

verdict.description: changes_requested if any rule violation was found in the diff, otherwise pass.

findings.description: One entry per concrete rule violation on a changed line. Empty when verdict is pass.

path.description: Repo-relative path of the changed file.

line.description: 1-indexed line in the file the finding anchors to.

rule.description: The rules/*.md file whose clause is violated, e.g. 'ci-safety'.

message.description: What is wrong, the clause violated, and the fix.
